question.plain: Derive the cos double-angle identity from the Pythagorean identity

steps.fromLatex: \cos x \cdot \cos x = \cos^2 x \quad \text{and} \quad \sin x \cdot \sin x = \sin^2 x
steps.toLatex: \cos x \cdot \cos x = \cos^2 x \quad \text{and} \quad \sin x \cdot \sin x = \sin^2 x
steps.description: Any value times itself is its square: cosх × cosх = cos²x, sinx × sinx = sin²x

question.plain: Solve sin(3x) = 0 on [0, π]

steps.description: Enumerate: n=0,1,2,3 all give x in [0,π]; n=4 gives x=4π/3 > π, out of range
